hooks.command: bash -c 'COUNT=$(find /Volumes/WORK900_CRISPAI/810-26-NATSEC-CV/platform/collection/inbox -maxdepth 1 -type f \( -iname "*.heic" -o -iname "*.jpg" -o -iname "*.jpeg" -o -iname "*.png" -o -iname "*.mov" -o -iname "*.mp4" \) 2>/dev/null | wc -l | tr -d " "); if [ "$COUNT" -gt 0 ]; then echo "[collection-inbox] $COUNT new file(s) waiting in platform/collection/inbox/ — run ./scripts/ingest-collection.sh or ask Claude to process them."; fi'
